work.name: Predicate.io
highlights: Engineered performant Go APIs, consistent latency <100ms response time across critical services for a high-growth startup.
Reduced Docker image build time 180s -> 20s using buildkit and layer caching. Speeding up local dev and CI workflows.
Delivered intuitive and performant frontend experiences using React and Next.js
Led full-stack development of sleek frontend experiences and robust Go backend APIs
Architected efficient async background job processing system using Go channels and worker pools, handling 10K+ concurrent tasks with 99.9% reliability and sub-second processing times.

work.name: Chainalysis
highlights: Took over and improved our second largest React/Next.js app, enhancing maintainability and shipping velocity.
-50K lines of legacy code removed - Continuously reducing complexity while delivering new features and increasing reliable testing.
Technical Stewardship – Guiding development for teams without dedicated frontend engineers, ensuring efficient feature delivery.
Company-wide design system – Contributing code and shaping direction to keep it simple and maintainable.
Resolved high-priority client issues – Tackled issues from top clients, improving user experience and eliminating major pain points.
Cross-functional Collaboration – working closely with other product/design/engineering teams
Best practices – Implemented data fetching and rendering optimizations for high-performance frontend applications.

work.name: Bentobox
highlights: Built 50+ pixel-perfect UI, high-quality, responsive components from Figma designs using React.
Aligned specs across 5+ teams to ensure smooth cross-functional collaboration and on-time feature delivery.
Reduced tech debt by 30% by prioritizing maintainable code with a strong focus on simplicity, clarity, and UX.
Resolved critical race conditions affecting 10,000+ users, improving stability and preventing bad user experiences.

work.name: Brkfst.io
work.summary: Brkfst.io creates performance-based video ads at scale, syndicated across social platforms
highlights: Refactored legacy Node.js modules into modular, well‑documented REST APIs, improving maintainability and simplifying future feature development.
Built a comprehensive browser automation testing suite with Playwright, reducing manual QA work and catching regressions earlier in the pipeline.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries and introduced caching strategies to enhance job performance and API response times.
Delivered backend infrastructure enhancements including database optimizations, API rate limiting, and centralized error handling to increase platform reliability.
Led migration from a legacy Webpack build system to modern tooling, reducing technical debt and improving developer efficiency through automated performance monitoring.
Designed and implemented AWS infrastructure using Terraform, establishing robust CI/CD pipelines that streamlined deployments.

work.name: TXT Group
highlights: Acted as a point of reference/mentor for developers learning: Nodejs, React.js, Redux.js & Typescript.
Lead the development of a React/Typescript web control panel for operating Flight Simulators remotely via tablet for Leonardo SpA.
Maintained c# two Xamarin Mobile apps used by ITT Inc in Automotive industry for collecting diagnostic break data transfered over wifi and low power bluetooth.
Developed a c# app for collecting and processing flight data in collaboration with IATA Turbulence aware campaign to reduce fuel costs and flight *bumpiness*
Developed a c# WPF Simulator for training the proper use of the ADRIAN system.
